// Status: Build Tool Component
// Purpose: SemVer Dependency Resolution.
// Polish: Replaced "latest" logic with real SemVer constraint matching.

use semver::{Version, VersionReq}; // Assumes `semver` crate is present
use std::collections::HashMap;

pub struct Resolver {
    registry: HashMap<String, Vec<Version>>,
}

impl Resolver {
    pub fn new() -> Self {
        Self { registry: HashMap::new() }
    }

    pub fn add_package(&mut self, name: &str, versions: Vec<&str>) {
        let mut parsed: Vec<Version> = versions.iter()
            .filter_map(|v| Version::parse(v).ok())
            .collect();
        parsed.sort(); // Ensure sorted for resolution
        self.registry.insert(name.to_string(), parsed);
    }

    /// Resolves the highest matching version for a constraint.
    /// Example constraint: "^1.0"
    pub fn resolve(&self, pkg: &str, constraint: &str) -> Result<Version, String> {
        let req = VersionReq::parse(constraint).map_err(|e| format!("Invalid constraint: {}", e))?;
        
        match self.registry.get(pkg) {
            Some(versions) => {
                // Find highest version that satisfies the requirement
                versions.iter().rev()
                    .find(|v| req.matches(v))
                    .cloned()
                    .ok_or_else(|| format!("No version of {} matches {}", pkg, constraint))
            }
            None => Err(format!("Package {} not found in registry", pkg)),
        }
    }
}
